title: Teaching Assistant, Violin
description:
Interested applicants are invited to apply directly at the NUS Career Portal

Your application will be processed only if you apply via NUS Career Portal

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Job Description

The Yong Siew Toh Conservatory of Music (YST) is seeking a full-time Teaching Assistant (Violin). The initial term of appointment shall be for one year (renewable).

The job scope will include working with the Head of Strings and Violin Studios in teaching Violin Majors. In addition, the postholder will offer secondary study tuition to a select number of the Conservatory’s instrumental students.  

Responsibilities of the appointment include:
•  Assist in teaching Violin Major students and all activities related to the Conservatory’s Violin Studios, including preparing students for competitions and other major events.  
•  Producing and integrating videos for teaching and learning.
•  Working with YST’s Admissions in student recruitment for the Violin studio.
•  Administrative Support and Co-Ordinator for Strings department

Qualifications

Requirements for interested applicants include:
•  A Masters degree in Violin Performance.
•  Significant performance experience as a soloist and international competition prize winner.
•  Teaching experience in a conservatory or other tertiary-level institutions focused on professional training at an elite performance level.
•  Experience in recording instrumental performance and instructional videos, with basic video and audio editing skills.
•  Passion for teaching, engaging and supporting undergraduate conservatory students.
•  Works well in a collaborative and innovative conservatory environment.

Qualified candidates should send a letter of interest, curriculum vitae outlining teaching background and experience, to the Search Committee at NUS Careers.  

The selection process will commence in February 2026 and continue until the position is filled.  Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
The National University of Singapore aspires to be a vital community of academics, researchers, staff, students and alumni working together in a spirit of innovation and enterprise for a better world.

 

Our singular focus on talent will be the cornerstone of a truly great university that is dedicated to quality education, influential research and visionary enterprise, in service of country and society.
